rationale: A massive, visible deployment of armored units along the forward line will signal resolve and disrupt enemy calculations during this fragile lull.
Conducting a coordinated fleet maneuver near contested waters will reinforce our regional dominance and pressure Tethyan supply routes.
Persistent surveillance is essential to detect enemy buildups early and protect our logistical lines amid growing operational uncertainty.
Given the moderate crisis level and ongoing military and economic pressures, securing our networks against Tethyan cyber espionage and disruption is essential to protect operational integrity.
Proactive counterintelligence will neutralize foreign agents exploiting our domestic vulnerabilities, especially in light of increasing international pressure and internal strain from sanctions.

A calibrated domestic information campaign will reinforce public resilience and maintain support for the operation, aligning with Deputy Minister Yuri Volkov’s success in information operations while staying within recommended strategic bounds.

Precision sanctions on Tethyan financial institutions and defense-adjacent industries will amplify economic pressure without triggering broad humanitarian fallout that could erode international support.
Seizing Tethyan state assets held in neutral jurisdictions exploits legal vulnerabilities and funds our war bonds, directly linking financial warfare to military sustainment.
Controlled devaluation of our currency will insulate export sectors from sanction retaliation and preserve critical revenue streams amid tightening global markets.
A visible demonstration of our combat readiness will exploit their current logistical vulnerability and deter further aggression.
Continuous intelligence gathering along the western front will identify emerging weaknesses in their regrouping forces.
Strengthening aerial surveillance over our own territory ensures early warning against surprise maneuvers while projecting control.
Strengthening our digital infrastructure is critical to protect against Novaris intelligence probes and maintain operational integrity during this fragile stabilization.
Proactively identifying and neutralizing Novaris espionage networks will prevent exploitation of our logistical vulnerabilities and safeguard sensitive military planning.
Shaping the domestic and international information environment will reinforce public trust and align with diplomatic efforts to sustain foreign support.
Precision sanctions on key Novaris defense-sector entities will amplify economic pressure without triggering broader retaliation that could destabilize our fragile markets.
Seizing offshore assets linked to Novaris oligarchs undermines their war financing and complements the intelligence ministry’s counterintelligence efforts by disrupting covert funding streams.
Imposing selective trade restrictions on dual-use technologies strengthens our economic warfare posture while staying within the bounds of international support and avoiding over-escalation.
Leveraging our high international support, we must institutionalize Tethys' position through formal multilateral forums to solidify diplomatic legitimacy and coordinate targeted pressure on Novaris.
Strengthening alliances with like-minded states will amplify our collective influence, ensuring sustained political and material support during this critical stabilization phase.
Inviting neutral international observers to monitor our conduct reinforces transparency, bolsters global trust, and counters Novaris’ disinformation efforts amid frontline uncertainties.
